STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY GALLERIA NUVO, INC. MEAMAR, ALI DBA THE ART PEOPLE GALLERY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALLERIA NUVO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEAMAR, ALI DBA THE ART PEOPLE GALLERY $2,125.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,175.00, DEFENDANT HAD DUTY TO PREVENT THEFT OF CONSIGNED JEWELRY AND FAILED TO DO SO; LEGAL EXPENSES DISALLOWED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,437.00 FILED BY GALLERIA NUVO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MEAMAR, ALI DBA THE ART PEOPLE GALLERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
